title: Illinois Tech and Moraine Valley Community College Announce Guaranteed Admission and Scholarships
summary_en: CHICAGO—May 4, 2026— Illinois Institute of Technology (Illinois Tech) and Moraine Valley Community College have announced a guaranteed admission partnership and articulation agreement that creates a...
